wands.legend: The first flame stolen for mortals — every wand card carries that defiant spark.

cups.legend: Vessels that held divine nectar and human tears — the cup never empties, only deepens.

swords.legend: Blades that cut illusion. What swords reveal cannot be un-seen.

pentacles.legend: Coins stamped with the world-serpent — wealth as rhythm, not hoard.

major.legend: Twenty-two gates from innocence to wholeness — the oldest story in the deck.

00.legend: Steps off the cliff laughing — not ignorance, but trust in the unseen bridge.
00.science: Quantum superposition: all paths open until observed.

01.legend: As above, so below — the table holds all four elements because the mage already does.
01.science: Agency: tools + intention = measurable outcome shift.

02.legend: Sits between pillars marked B and J — the veil is not locked, only quiet.
02.science: Default mode network: answers surface when noise stops.

03.legend: Crowned by stars, rooted in wheat — creation that feeds without depleting.

04.legend: Stone throne, iron crown — order carved from chaos so life can repeat.

05.legend: Two keys — exoteric and esoteric. Tradition is a ladder, not a ceiling.

06.legend: Angel above, lovers below — choice as alignment, not punishment.
06.science: Coherence: head-heart integration reduces decision entropy.

07.legend: Black and white sphinxes — opposites yoked. Victory through direction.

08.legend: Opens the lion's jaw with gentleness — force without violence.

09.legend: Mountain lantern — light enough for one step, not the whole path.

10.legend: Rise and fall are the same wheel — you are not outside the cycle, you ride it.
10.science: Stochastic processes: luck is distribution, not absence of law.

11.legend: Heart weighed against truth — karma is accounting, not revenge.
11.science: Reciprocity bias and equilibrium in social systems.

12.legend: Upside down to see right-side up — surrender as strategy.
12.science: Reframing: perspective shift unlocks stuck problems.

13.legend: The sun still rises on the field — endings are compost for beginnings.
13.science: Phase transitions: old state must dissolve for new order.

14.legend: Water poured between cups — integration, not dilution.

15.legend: Chains are loose. The throne is desire. Name it to unbind.
15.science: Dopamine loops: awareness breaks unconscious attachment.

16.legend: Crown blasted from false heights — only rotten architecture falls.
16.science: Critical failure clears technical debt; systems rebuild stronger.

17.legend: One foot in water, one on land — hope after flood is oldest magic.
17.science: Placebo + agency: belief opens behavioral pathways.

18.legend: Two towers, one path — dreams speak in symbol, not spreadsheet.
18.science: Sleep consolidation: unconscious processing is data integration.

19.legend: Naked truth, walled garden — joy as evidence, not reward.
19.science: Circadian clarity: daylight cognition is more accurate.

20.legend: The dead hear the call — answer what you already know.
20.science: Neuroplasticity: identity updates after decisive action.

21.legend: Wreath closed. Four corners witnessed. The dance completes.
21.science: System closure: integrated whole > sum of parts.
